# ValuCore Africa — Manager Templates

These templates turn the SOPs and onboarding packs into repeatable management tools.

Use them for:

- week-one check-ins
- 30-day readiness reviews
- department onboarding signoff
- role-based KPI conversations

Read these alongside:

- [docs/current-functionality-bible.md](/Users/michaeladeleye/Documents/product/ERP Surveyors/docs/current-functionality-bible.md)
- [docs/sops/README.md](/Users/michaeladeleye/Documents/product/ERP Surveyors/docs/sops/README.md)
- [docs/onboarding/README.md](/Users/michaeladeleye/Documents/product/ERP Surveyors/docs/onboarding/README.md)

## Templates

- [operations-scorecard.md](/Users/michaeladeleye/Documents/product/ERP Surveyors/docs/templates/operations-scorecard.md)
- [valuers-scorecard.md](/Users/michaeladeleye/Documents/product/ERP Surveyors/docs/templates/valuers-scorecard.md)
- [reviewers-scorecard.md](/Users/michaeladeleye/Documents/product/ERP Surveyors/docs/templates/reviewers-scorecard.md)
- [finance-scorecard.md](/Users/michaeladeleye/Documents/product/ERP Surveyors/docs/templates/finance-scorecard.md)
- [field-officers-scorecard.md](/Users/michaeladeleye/Documents/product/ERP Surveyors/docs/templates/field-officers-scorecard.md)

## Recommended Use

1. Use the onboarding pack during the first week.
2. Use the scorecard at the end of week one.
3. Use the same scorecard again at day 30.
4. Add live KPI values and manager comments in the same template so progression is visible.
